author: @fuyuki1608
text: this marks the fist time i pay to watch a vid ever; just shows how much i love morimens; but yeah as of now there are multiple things that have changed in morimens, right now they're having a collab with saya no uta and giving out 250 pulls for free, along with the huge amont of free pulls they already give; i'm pretty sure the game is now fully translated in english by humans. also, the pvp in this game is basically entierly optional ignoring ofc the very small amout if rewards they give for it. while yes, some characters get better with dupes, they are all good and usable in their own way and niches even without any dupes, while ofc there is a few characters that are just really good. the game is ultra f2p friendly and you can basically get all characters for free since most of them get reruns pretty often. personally, i have played the games for a few months as of now and i have all fut 2 characters.

author: @divineclaypuppet7460
text:
47:42 There he went on another theme: previous was wheels, in which you can go up to 16 copies total - The Covenants (the slices) are the "Equipment" your character can have: you can farm them or buy them in the shop, you don't need to do gacha for these
1:04:10 : the situation has changed a lot, and as of today the entirety Arc 1 and most of the events have been fully manually translated. They are also collaborating with the fans (a lot) to improve the translation internationally and have managed to hire professional translators
1:06:54 They do have actual Voice Actors for the characters. In specific, they actually pushed back by two weeks the release of Doresain, the King of Necroviah (a Vampire), to allow casting for Takehito Koyasu. The voice actor for DIO in Jojo.
1:14:43 Yeah okay we know who we are, we want to romance the uncomprehensible dimensional horror beyond our mortal understanding

author: @divineclaypuppet7460
text:
20:23 Ok so to explain the Realms functions : 
- Chaos is mostly humans, but: they are the Researchers type, those that try to understand the world around them and all. Think of them as your protagonists in like Call of Cthulhu, where you're an investigator sometimes "blessed" or "cursed" by the Higher Beings (mostly cursed honestly). In Morimens, it's mostly people from Mythag University, the faction of the Protagonist. 
This Realm has Tawil, the incarnation of the God of Omniscience and Forbidden Knowledge from beyond the Gate of the Silver Key (inspired by Umr-at Tawil, an outer god who's an avatar of Yog-Sothoth)

- Aequor is the most recognisable "Cthulhu" faction: they are Lovecraftian people related to the water or the depths, coming from the Eternal Lemuria (Legally Distinct Rlyeh). 
This realm has Tulu, who's a twink with tentacles from his back who is obviously inspired by Cthulhu. He was the God-king of Lemuria.

- Caro is all the gothic, vampire, kinda body-transfiguration

author: @ATrashKeeper
text:
A few clarifications: 
1. do i recommend this team? hell no, kath already works with other units and
there's no need to go through so many hoops just to make a meme comp work.
(Who can say if some actual good player can make this work though)

2. i did kinda misplay in my rotation, i could've used GRamona's skill to pull
Saya's 0 cost, guaranteeing a reshuffle and keeping my posse/kath exalt in case i was unlucky.

3. I just used W3 out of laziness but this is not the ideal boss for this comp.
Saya's soulforge increases corrosion value against caro enemies, you can probably stack so much more.
Alas it didn't matter, i didn't even trigger the full corrosion.

4. I did not have E3 yet when i did this, so again, corrosion value can go higher.

author: @TheArcSet
text:
Isaac was so engaging because room to room the most basic things could change: constantly varying movement SPD, size, range and attack SPD/shape meant you were constantly readjusting.
I've always meant to buy the remake, but I sunk so long into the (far harder) original.
Darkest Dungeon (I/II) is fun and the story looks good, but it's a long game demanding patience.
